title: Sodium nitroprusside
body_html:
Sodium nitroprusside can only be given parenterally and is used in severe hypertensive crises. It should be used with caution in patients with hyponatraemia and hypothyroidism. It is metabolised to cyanide. Cyanide levels should therefore be monitored.

Gastrointestinal and general pharmacology
